wellness.title: Menstrual Leave
wellness.subtitle: Log a 30-minute wellness break (up to 3 days per month)
wellness.onlyFemale: This feature is only available to female employees.

adminSettings.title: System Configuration
adminSettings.subtitle: Adjust default parameters. Changes take effect within 1 minute.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Customize your notifications and language
settings.emailNotifLabel: Send email for leave request events
settings.emailNotifHint: Includes: pending approval, approved/rejected, cancellation requests and their outcomes.

translator.translated: Translated by DeepL · may contain inaccuracies

overview.introDesc: Leave Manager is a system for managing leave, OT (overtime), and Flex Time (makeup hours). Goal: digitize the entire leave request - approval - makeup process, reduce paperwork, and provide transparent leave balance.
overview.featureLeaveDesc: Annual leave, unpaid leave; 2-level approval; 2-month grace period
overview.featureOtDesc: Record overtime, convert to leave days (OT bank) or cash (rate by day type)
overview.featureFlexDesc: Track monthly hour deficit and makeup; auto-settle at month end
overview.featureApproveDesc: Manager approves level 1, Head approves level 2 (if needed)
overview.roleEmployee: Employee: request leave, record OT, record Flex Time, view personal reports.
overview.roleManager: Manager: approve level 1 requests from team members.
overview.roleHead: Department Head: approve level 2, approve Flex Time, view department reports.
overview.roleAdmin: Admin: CRUD employees, holidays, view all reports.
overview.conceptCycleDesc: Annual leave cycle from June 1 → May 31 next year. Each employee gets 96 hours (12 days).
overview.conceptGraceDesc: If using OT to convert to leave days, 2 months after cycle ends (until July 31) you can still use OT bank from the old cycle if not exhausted.
overview.conceptSeniorityDesc: Every 5 years get +8h (1 day). Calculated from June 1 of the year you joined (favorable to employee).
overview.conceptValidHoursDesc: Only counted within business hours, minus 1 hour lunch 12:00-13:00. Weekends and holidays excluded.

leave.step1Desc: Go to My Leaves → New Leave. Select type (Paid/Unpaid), start time, hours. System calculates end time based on shift.
leave.step2Desc: You can save as Draft to edit later, or Submit directly to pending status.
leave.step3Desc: Manager receives notification. If request ≤ 8 hours and Manager approves, done. If > 8 hours or you are the Manager → forward to level 2.
leave.step4Desc: Applies to requests > 8 hours or when requester is Manager/Head.
leave.step5Desc: If approved, leave hours are deducted. If rejected, you can edit and resubmit.
leave.cancelNote: Cancel approved request: you can only Request Cancel and need Manager/Head re-approval.

ot.title: Record OT (Overtime)
ot.desc: Go to OT Records → Record OT. Enter date, start-end time, reason. System calculates rate:
ot.convertNote: OT can convert to leave days (accumulated in OT bank, used for leave) or cash (based on rates above).

flex.title: Flex Time (Makeup Hours)
flex.desc: Flex Time is for hour deficits within the month (late arrival, early leave, personal matters < 4h) without deducting leave. You must make up these hours within the same month.
flex.step1Desc: Go to Flex Time → Record Deficit. Enter date, deficit hours, reason.
flex.step2Desc: When you've made up hours → Record Makeup. Head confirms.
flex.step3Desc: At month end, system auto-settles: any remaining deficit is deducted from annual leave.
flex.warningNote: Before the 25th of each month, system sends warning if you have outstanding deficit.

wellness.title: Menstrual Leave (Wellness)
wellness.desc: For female employees. Maximum 1.5 hours per month.
wellness.step1Desc: Go to Wellness → select date + start time + duration:
wellness.step2Desc: System auto-calculates end time based on selected duration.
wellness.step3Desc: Manager approves level 1, Head approves level 2. Does not deduct annual leave.
wellness.note: Only employees with FEMALE gender see this in sidebar.

approve.title: Approvals
approve.desc: Go to Approvals to see pending requests under your authority.
approve.item1: Click on a request to view details + history.
approve.item2: Approve to approve. If level 2 needed, request auto-forwards.
approve.item3: Reject requires a reason. Employee will be notified.
approve.item4: Cancel Request (for approved requests) also appears here.
approve.headNote: Head also approves Flex Time Makeup from department employees.

reports.title: Reports
reports.daily: Daily: who is on leave today
reports.weekly: Weekly: leave hours chart by day
reports.monthly: Monthly: leave, OT, flex summary by employee
reports.filterNote: Can filter by department (for Head/Admin) and export CSV.

admin.title: Admin
admin.itemEmployees: Employees: add/edit/delete employees, change role, change manager, reset password.
admin.itemHolidays: Holidays: configure holidays by year. Affects leave calculation & OT rates.
admin.itemFridayOverride: Friday Override: configure which weeks Friday works like a regular day (8h instead of 7h).
admin.newEmployeeNote: When creating new employee, system auto-allocates 96h leave for current cycle.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How to record half-day morning leave?
faq.a1: Create request with start time = shift start, end time = 12:00 (lunch).
faq.q2: Does unused OT bank from old cycle expire?
faq.a2: There's a 2-month grace period (until July 31 next year) to use OT for leave. After that, OT bank expires.
faq.q3: I forgot to Submit, boss can't see my request?
faq.a3: DRAFT requests are only visible to you. Go to request detail → Submit to send for approval.
faq.q4: I changed my mind, want to cancel approved request?
faq.a4: Open approved request → Request Cancel. Manager/Head will re-approve. If OK, leave hours are refunded.
faq.q5: How is Flex Time different from leave?
faq.a5: Leave = deducts annual quota. Flex = temporary hour deficit, must makeup within month, only deducts if not made up by month-end settlement.
faq.q6: I'm a Manager, who approves my leave?
faq.a6: Your request goes directly to Head (you can't self-approve).
faq.a7: Use correct company email + password. If forgotten, contact Admin to reset.
faq.a8: Every 5 years get +8h (1 day). Calculated from June 1 of the year you joined (favorable to employee). Example: joined March 15, 2020 → milestone = June 1, 2019 → by June 1, 2024 get +8h bonus.
faq.a9: Filter by date range shows all requests with leave dates overlapping that range. Example: filter May 15-20 shows request for May 10-17 (overlaps) but not May 10-14 (no overlap).

leaveDetail.deleteDialogDesc: This action cannot be undone. The leave request will be permanently deleted.
leaveDetail.cancelDialogDescRequest: This will submit a cancellation request for this approved leave.
leaveDetail.cancelDialogDescCancel: This will cancel your pending leave request.

approvals.subtitle: Review and approve leave requests from your team

approvals.rejectDesc: Please provide a reason for rejecting this leave request. The employee will be notified.
approvals.errRejectReason: Please provide a reason for rejection.
approvals.toastCancelRejected: Cancellation rejected. The leave remains approved.
approvals.rejectCancelDesc: The leave will remain approved. The employee will be notified.
approvals.rejectOtCancelDesc: The OT will remain approved. The employee will be notified.
approvals.cancelRequestNote: The employee requested to cancel this leave. Approving will restore the deducted balance.
approvals.otCancelRequestNote: The employee requested to cancel this OT. Approving will restore the deducted hours.

employees.title: Employee Management
employees.subtitle: Manage employee accounts and assignments
employees.joinDateHint: Every 5 years of service grants an extra day (8h) of annual leave.
employees.editDesc: Update employee information. Leave password blank to keep current.
employees.name: Name
employees.confirmDelete:
Delete employee "{name}"?

This action cannot be undone. If the employee has leave/OT/flex history, the system will block deletion and suggest deactivation instead.
employees.errPasswordRequired: Password is required for new employees
employees.confirmDeactivate:
Deactivate account "{name}"?

This employee will no longer be able to sign in. Leave / OT / flex history is preserved. You can reactivate anytime.
employees.confirmReactivate:
Reactivate account "{name}"?

The employee will be able to sign in again.

holidays.title: Holiday Management
holidays.subtitle: Manage company holidays
holidays.addDesc: Add a new company holiday for {year}.
holidays.name: Name
holidays.deleteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this holiday? This action cannot be undone.

fridayOverride.title: Friday Extended Hours
fridayOverride.subtitle: Configure weeks where Friday works like weekdays (8h instead of 7h)
fridayOverride.addDesc: Select a week to make Friday work like a regular weekday (8h). Affects leave hour calculations.
fridayOverride.pickWeek: Pick any day in the week
fridayOverride.deleteDesc: Are you sure you want to remove this configuration? Friday of that week will return to normal hours.
